LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT STEPHENS INSTITUTE'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION. DEFENDANT STEPHENS INSTITUTE DBA ACADEMY OF ART UNIVERSITY'S ("DEFENDANT") MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS GRANTED. THE PROCEEDINGS ARE STAYED PENDING THE OUTCOME OF ARBITRATION. (9 U.S.C. SEC. 1.). (SEE WORD MINUTES FOR FULL DETAILS)ORDER IS SIGNED. (AS FULLY REPORTED IN THE REPORTER'S NOTES/TRANSCRIPT).JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR., CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: JUDI JOHNSON, CSR# 14174, 516-965-6565, OFFICIALREPORTER@PM.ME, REPORTED. MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION
Off Calendar May-24-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT STEPHENS INSTITUTE, MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION

Appearances (by Zoom):
Tamarah Prevost, Esq. 650-697-6000 Cotchett Pitre & McCarthy LLP for Plaintiff. (in-person)
Angela Veronese, Esq. Joe Alioto Veronese, Esq. (415) 434-8700 for Defendant.
Court reporter: Judi Johnson, CSR# 14174, 516-965-6565, officialreporter@pm.me, reported.

RULING - A R G U E D. Ms. Prevost argues. Mr. Veronese responds re; flexibility of the confidentiality agreeement on arbitration. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript).The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT STEPHENS INSTITUTE'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION.

Defendant Stephens Institute dba Academy of Art University's ("Defendant") motion to compel arbitration is granted. The proceedings are stayed pending the outcome of arbitration. (9 U.S.C. sec. 1.). (see word minutes for full details)

Order is signed.

(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript).

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court reporter: Judi Johnson, CSR# 14174, 516-965-6565, officialreporter@pm.me, reported. (302/RBU)
